name: BreAK CRC-001 benchmark calibration (PDF)
what_it_solves: Benchmark calibration document for the BreAK CRC-001 trial — how CrisPRO's predictions map to the trial's efficacy assumptions.
how_it_solves: PDF pairs each trial arm's assumed effect with the CrisPRO-predicted axis dependencies; deltas are quarantined until PATH A recomputation.
why_it_exists: Provides the diligence backbone: any Brenus claim about BreAK CRC-001 outcomes is checked against this calibration PDF, not the pitch deck.
gaps_still_open: LATIFY deltas (CT-03/DL-05/PC-06) remain quarantined until vector version resolved.
PC-02 permanently downgraded until retroactive prediction reproduction.
